applicationWindow.notes: NR archery deer is one of the most competitive whitetail draws in the US. Verify exact 2026 deadline at iowadnr.gov.

nr.notes: NR archery deer ~$602 if drawn. Typical 3+ year wait for an NR bow tag. Iowa whitetails are world-class — one of the top trophy states.

pointSystem.notes: Iowa uses a preference point system for NR deer. Build points annually.

otc.notes: NR deer is draw-only — not OTC.
